verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.9.0/R5 latest-main strict-allowlist moneyline MM canary for Pittsburgh Pirates @ Philadelphia Phillies completed the full lifecycle: pregame setup passed, contest 6 was created and verified, speculation 10 was seeded with zero residual seed exposure, the market maker posted two tiny live quotes under contest allowlist [6], one controlled quote was filled, remaining visible exposure drained to zero, official final score Pittsburgh Pirates 6 / Philadelphia Phillies 1 was verified, contest 6 was scored, speculation 10 settled to away/upper/Pittsburgh Pirates, winning controlled positions were claimed, and final target commitments plus active/pending/claimable positions are zero.

capabilities.notes: Primary PIT away @ PHI home contest 6/spec 10 passed official pre-game status, identity, allowlist, odds, and lead-time gates.
SDK/CLI v0.9.0, MM head 6121a73+, installed SDK v0.9.0, typecheck/test/build, and ancillary repo heads were verified.
Expected-address checks passed for ospex-stage-maker-b, ospex-stage-maker-a, and ospex-flow-a; public allowances were bounded.
Only a bounded 1.000000 USDC TreasuryModule approval was sent for ospex-stage-maker-b; no unlimited approvals were used.
Candidates --allowlist-only returned exactly contest 6 quote_ready; quote dry-run canQuote=true; dry run would-submit remained target-scoped.
Two tiny live commitments posted under strict allowlist [6], moneyline only, speculation 10 only.
Exactly one controlled fill succeeded against live commitment 0x6d2a5bd0… using ospex-flow-a.
Telemetry captured the fill with source own-state-stream for the filled commitment hash.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero, target active/pending/claimable positions are zero after postgame, and no orphan MM process remained.
A fresh dry-run/cold-start probe stayed target-scoped; synthetic dry records were cleaned from live state before final reporting.
Official final score PIT 6, PHI 1 was verified and contest 6 scored.
Winning upper/Pittsburgh Pirates seed-maker and live-taker positions were claimed; losing lower/PHI positions are no-op.
Tiny canary risk stayed within the requested caps; recorded lifecycle gas is summarized.

transactions.purpose: Bounded 1.000000 USDC TreasuryModule approval for setup fees.
Fully match tiny manual seed to create speculation 10 with zero residual seed exposure.
Exactly one controlled live fill against the live MM quote.
Request R5 score for contest 6 after official final.
Claim manual seed maker winning upper/PIT position.
Claim controlled live-taker winning upper/PIT position.
